The current IsHeaderLike filter misses standalone day-name tokens like 'MON' (causing Andee's spurious 'MON' value) and bare date numbers that OCR reads from header rows, allowing them to shift the positional OCR pre-fill mapping and corrupt all subsequent employee assignments.

Standalone day-name tokens like 'MON' passing IsHeaderLike enter the OCR positional pre-fill map and shift all subsequent employee assignments in that column, causing cascading WRONG_VALUE errors across the entire September week; expanding IsHeaderLike to reject DayIndexMap entries and day-prefix tokens prevents this misalignment.
